name: nyc_rat_containerization_2023_2024
description: NYC Department of Sanitation mandatory-containerization rollout. Pilot phase launched in lower Manhattan (community districts MN 01-09) on 2023-07-01; citywide commercial-corridor enforcement began 2024-03-01 and expanded to residential buildings >30 units on 2024-07-01.
source: NYC DSNY press releases 2023-06-15, 2024-02-20, 2024-06-12; NYC 311 service-request system policy changelog.
